name: persona-jammer-compose
note: S-COMPOSE-CALM slice 1 (operator F 2026-07-19 + interview: B+ shape). P3 Jammer: Compose lands as a PURE JAM surface - no Chords|Song mode toggle, no song tray/capture row, no song-map chips ambient on the jam screen (the canvas is an on-demand editor behind Save > grow / Library > open). Save with a fresh strip asks intent with SAVE PROGRESSION as the primary (2-tap capture). Written red-first: the pre-fix tree renders #composeModeSeg + #songTray chrome.

steps.label: no ambient song chrome: no mode toggle, no song tray, no map chips on the jam surface
steps.js: (function(){function gone(sel){var e=document.querySelector(sel);return !e || e.hidden || e.getBoundingClientRect().height===0;}return gone('#composeModeSeg') && gone('#songTray') && gone('#songMap');})()

steps.label: the strip carries the jam (2 chords)
STILL no song chrome after building a progression (the old tray appeared here)
steps.js: (function(){function gone(sel){var e=document.querySelector(sel);return !e || e.hidden || e.getBoundingClientRect().height===0;}return gone('#songTray') && gone('#songMap') && gone('#composeModeSeg');})()
